text.style: font-family: 'Open Sans', verdana, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; fill: rgb(192, 57, 43); fill-opacity: 1; white-space: pre;

text.style: opacity: 1; font-family: 'Open Sans', verdana, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; fill: rgb(42, 63, 95); fill-opacity: 1; white-space: pre;
text.tspan: Who searches Kenner's Flock cameras: searches by the agency's home state
​10.26M searches by 5,254 outside agencies, Jan 1 2024 - Jan 16 2026. State parsed from the agency name (99.1% of searches attributed).​
​Texas alone: 2.69M searches (26%), driven by Houston PD (1.01M) and Dallas PD (0.88M).​

rect.style: stroke-width: 1px; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-opacity: 0; fill: rgb(0, 0, 0); fill-opacity: 0;

text.style: font-family: 'Open Sans', verdana, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; fill: rgb(102, 102, 102); fill-opacity: 1; white-space: pre; pointer-events: all;
text.tspan: Source: public record request (Flock audit logs Jan 2024 - Jan 16 2026, Kenner's own searches excluded):
Not on the map: 13 federal agencies (64,382 searches) and 40 multi-state or unidentifiable agencies (29,513 searches, 0.3%).
More info on the methodology on github.com/eye-on-surveillance
